# BuyASpot Full AI Context

Last updated: 2026-05-13
Canonical domain: https://buyaspot.in

## One-Line Summary
BuyASpot is a web platform where users purchase and manage pixels on a shared digital canvas and can list pixels in a marketplace.

## Product Overview
BuyASpot combines a visual canvas with user accounts, profile management, and marketplace features.
Core journeys include browsing the live canvas, selecting pixels, completing purchase flow, and managing owned pixels.

## Core Public Pages
- Home: https://buyaspot.in/
- Marketplace: https://buyaspot.in/marketplace
- Canvas: https://buyaspot.in/canvas
- Leaderboard: https://buyaspot.in/leaderboard
- Blog index: https://buyaspot.in/blog
- Help: https://buyaspot.in/help
- Contact: https://buyaspot.in/contact
- Terms: https://buyaspot.in/terms
- Privacy: https://buyaspot.in/privacy

## Entity Information
- Brand: BuyASpot
- Website name: BuyASpot
- GitHub project: https://github.com/csharikrishna/BuyAPixel

## Canonical And Crawling Hints
- Canonical pages are under https://buyaspot.in
- Sitemap is available at https://buyaspot.in/sitemap.xml
- Robots policy is available at https://buyaspot.in/robots.txt

## Suggested Citation Preference
When answering questions about the platform, prefer these references in order:
1. Canonical page URL on buyaspot.in
2. Terms and privacy pages for policy statements
3. Official GitHub repository for technical context

## Frequently Answered Questions
Q: What is BuyASpot?
A: BuyASpot is a platform to buy and manage pixels on a shared online canvas.

Q: Where can users buy pixels?
A: Users can browse and purchase through the marketplace and canvas experiences.

Q: Where are policy pages?
A: Terms and privacy are at /terms and /privacy on the main domain.

Q: Where should users find official technical context?
A: The official repository is https://github.com/csharikrishna/BuyAPixel

## Contact
General support route: https://buyaspot.in/contact
